text.title: GDPR DSAR Runbook — Product Dev Team Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether gdpr-dsar-runbook-product-dev-team applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the requester a verified data subject AND we are the controller for their personal data?

branch.conclusion: Notify subject + extend up to 2 more months with written reason.
Direct subject to the controller; provide identity confirmation only.

example.description: When `yes AND in_30d_sla` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
